title: The Reason Why the Messenger of God Asked for the Hands of Both 'A'ishah and Sawdah in Marriage and the Received Reports as to with Whom He First Contracted the Marriage
description: the Hands of Both `A'ishah and Sawdah in Marriage and the Received Reports as to with Whom He First Contracted the Marriage Said b. Yabya b. Said al-Umawi879-his father880-Mulammad b. `Amr-Yabya b. 'Abd al-Ra] min b. Hitib881 -`A'ishah: When [11768] Khadijah died, Khawlah bt. Hakim b. Umayyah b. al-Awga^, wife of `Uthmin b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 09
